Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

The Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University or KRSU was founded in 1993 and is one of the best universities in Kyrgyzstan. It is located in Bishkek, the capital city.

# Kyrgyzstan

Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

The Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University or KRSU was founded in 1993 and is one of the best universities in Kyrgyzstan. It is located in Bishkek, the capital city. Apart from medicine, engineering, and business, KRSU offers additional undergraduate and postgraduate programs in law and other disciplines. The university is well known for its scientific achievements and has over 50 students from different couztries who are provided with personal and academic support fostered by the KRSU environment.

KRSU is also acknowledged by various institutions like the WHO, making the degrees of the university internationally accepted. Apart from the low tuition fees, the university also provides it students with practical experience through primary clinical training in affiliated hospitals. To ease students in making new friends and acquiring new skills, KRSU conducts social and cultural activities congresses which contribute heavily to the holistic learning of the students.

Quick Highlights About Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Year of Establishment1993
RecognitionNMC and WHO approved
EligibilityStudents should get 50% aggregate in PCB(Physics, Chemistry and Biology)
Course Duration6 Years
NEETQualifying Marks
IELTS/TOFELNot Required
Medium of TeachingEnglish

Get Call Back from Atlas Mentor Counsellors

Why Choose Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan?

The Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, or KRSU, stands out as a valid option for those seeking to study in Kyrgyzstan. This is because it has high-quality schooling, low fees, and a rich multi-ethnic student population. Below are some reasons that make KRSU a smart choice: 

  1. Low Tuition Fees KRSU does not charge high fees enabling it to cater to students from different socioeconomic backgrounds. 
  2. Worldwide Acceptance Besides, the university has international recognition which means that your degree will be relevant in many nations including international bodies such as the WHO. 
  3. Multicultural Student Population Over 50 countries are represented among the students studying here. This is an excellent opportunity to socialize and learn from other cultures, thereby expanding your horizon. 
  4. Encouraging Active Learning for Medical Students KRSU has students rotate in hospitals which helps provide clinical hands-on experience to the medical students. 
  5. Engaging Campus Environment Students are provided with extracurricular activities and cultural programs which helps them develop socially and personally apart from academics. 
  6. Decent Academic Standards KRSU is famous for good education in particular medicine, engineering, business, and law from seasoned professors and instructors.

Fee Structure of Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

ParticularsYear 1Year 2Year 3Year 4Year 5Year 6
Tuition Fee3000 USD3000 USD3000 USD3000 USD3000 USD3000 USD
Hostel Fees600 USD600 USD600 USD600 USD600 USD600 USD

The KRYGIZ RUSSIAN SLAVIC UNIVERSITY (KRSU) offers a medical fee structure for international students, as placed below:

1st to 6th Year: $2,900 per year

(Note: 1 USD is roughly equated to ₹83.37)

In comparison to other institutions KRSU stands affordable for students pursuing MBBS. Some extra expenses include hostel payments, boarding, and daily spends which will be different as per the student’s requirement. However, KRSU does provide adequate provisions for students.

Eligibility Criteria To Study At Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

The attending students will need to justify their eligibility through the KRYGIZ RUSSIAN SLAVIC UNIVERSITY (KRSU) set rules.

Educational Requirements:

High school is a must and the intending student should show at least 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB).

Valid Passport:

The students need to provide a passport valid for at least six months after the intended study period.

Medical Certificate:

A medical certificate from a doctor indicating the candidate is fit to study physically and psychologically must be provided.

Financial Proof:

Proof of having sufficient funds for tuition fees, accommodation, and other living expenses for the duration of study at KRSU is required.

Knowledge of Languages:

Many programs require proficiency in the language of instruction (Russian or English). For English-language programs, you also need:

Minimum TOEFL score 550, or Minimum IELTS score 6.0

Hostel Facilities At Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University (KRSU) hosts students in a comfortable and well serviced hostel. Students are easily able to reach classes along with other amenities provided on campus as the hostels are situated close by.

Here are the important functions of the hostels:

Security: The premises are secured with 24/7 guards for the students’ safety.

Wifi: High speed internet is available for both academic work and for leisure.Laundry: Laundry services are offered for the students’ ease.

Separate Hostels: In order to ensure adequate privacy for students, the facilities include separate hostels for boys and girls.

Shared Facilities: There are common areas open to students for studying, games, or relaxing with friends.

During their studies at KRSU, students are provided with a suitable environment that fulfills their living needs as well as their academic and personal advancement.

Student Life At Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Life as a student of the Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University Living as a student of Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University (KRSU) entails numerous activities shaped around learning, culture, and social life. Below is a snapshot of life at KRSU:

Academic Environment: Students get a robust academic training at KRSU and are supported by the excellent faculty who are there to guide them as they undertake new challenges. Students are motivated to realize their interests and academic objectives.

Цultural Exchange: KRSU has students from more than fifty countries, which create a unique culture. Students can participate in international festivals, language immersion activities, and traditional dances to appreciate different cultures.

Extracurricular Activities: Students can join sports, cultural, self-governing bodies, and volunteer societies which expands their social activities. KRSU greatly facilitates friendship bonding by helping students learn new skills.

Social Engagement: The University provides students with welcoming spaces that enable them to relax, make friends, and interact. These functions encourage social participation through different student events which enhance community spirit.

To summarize, students attending KRSU get more than just an academic experience; they also benefit from the social, cultural, and personal development opportunities that come from being in a tolerant and multicultural setting.

Ranking of Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University is one of the leading institutions in Kyrgyzstan and has gained its popularity outside the country as well. Unirank ranked KRSU in 2024 as follows:

Country Rank: First in the country

World Rank: 4455

This ranking showcases the university’s level of academic performance, quality of education, and international acceptance in the specific areas of studies.

Advantages of Studying At Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Studying at Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University (KRSU) has numerous benefits that can help with the educational experience. These benefits include:

Affordable Living Costs: The expenses in Bishkek, where KRSU is located, is cheaper compared to other major cities. This allows students to devote time to their studies rather than worrying about how to meet their needs.

Internationally Recognized Degrees: KRSU is recognized by other entities like WHO which means that KRSU degrees are accepted globally.

Cultural Immersion: Studying in Kyrgyzstan provides and opportunity to travel to a new country, learn its traditions and language enhancing personal development.

Diverse Community: KRSU has a student body of more than 50 countries, and this enables students to interact with peers from different cultures, thus developing a global perspective.

Career Preparation: the university offers career counseling, internships and job placements which will assist you in the transition from school to the working world.

Hands-on Experience: KRSU offers clinical practical training for medical students. This will enable the students to integrate their knowledge to genuine clinical practice.

Supportive Environment: KRSU has a caring and friendly environment which is essential for foreign students studying abroad for the first time.

Placement At Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University (KRSU) assists its students actively in all placements and career opportunities which makes it quite renowned for its employment rates.

Career Counseling: KRSU helps students with their career pathways by guiding them appropriately and helping them procure jobs in relevant fields.

Internship Opportunities: The university’s services extend to finding internships for its participants, especially if the student is in the medical field, and it is invaluable for them.

Job Placement Assistance: KRSU also assists its alumni in getting jobs by facilitating them with prospective employers in other countries like India for medical graduates.

Higher Education Options: The university provides education planning services for students who want to pursue further studies of the university graduates.

Indeed, there are many sectors with good prospects for employment, however, the university does aid its students in seeking out jobs internationally after completing their degree.

Education Loan for Indian Students

Students from India wanting to study at, for instance, Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, can obtain an education loan to meet their tuition fees and other living expenses. Here is a guide on how to procure an education loan:

Eligibility:

An applicant has to be an Indian citizen.

The applicant should have secured admission to a recognized university or college abroad such as KRSU.

Having a good academic record (along with a reasonable NEET score for medical students) increases approval chances.

Loan Amount:

The amount of loan awarded is determined by the university fees, the course, and other expenses like accommodation and traveling. Loans available to study abroad can be from ₹10 lakhs to ₹40 lakhs and above.

Required Documents:

Admission letter from the university.

NEET scorecard (for medical students).

Passport and Visa.

Your parent’s income proof, tax returns, and property documents.

Academic certificates.

Interest Rates:

Interest rates are usually in the bracket of 9% and 15%, based on which bank is used and the amount of loan.

Repayment:

Most repayments begin after the course has been completed; however, there is a grace period of 6 months to 1 year. The repayment period could be from 5 years to 15 years.

Financial Assistance:

Traditionally, providers of education loans would offer assistance via counseling in financial matters and provide loans to students online.

Counselors at Atlas Mentor are willing to assist students with obtaining an education loan prior to leaving the country to study, which will guarantee the student is attending KRSU fully prepared.

FAQs At Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University, Kyrgyzstan

Below are the frequently asked questions regarding Kyrgyz Russian Slavic University (KRSU) to provide you with more information about studying there:

Who or what is KRSU?

It is a prominent university in Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan, which was set up in 1993, and offers a range of undergraduate and graduate programs, including medical studies, and is an academically excelled institution.

Does KRSU have international recognition?

Yes, KRSU is affiliated with various global organiations which include the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Educational Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG). Therefore this guarantees that your degree is valuable irrespective of the country.

What is the medium of instruction at KRSU?

KRSU uses Russian as the main language for instruction for majority of programs. However, some courses, including medical programs, are taught in English.

What is the tuition fee at KRSU?

Most programs at KRSU have reasonable tuition fees. For the medical programs (MBBS) the fee is roughly $2,900 per year.

Are there hostels within the university for students?

Yes. KRSU hostels are quite comfortable and provide basic services like internet, laundry services and separate hostels are available for boys and girls ensuring safety for students while living outside their homes.
